holds_belgian_nationality.name: holds_belgian_nationality
holds_belgian_nationality.description: The person holds Belgian nationality (directly asserted as a background fact in a case).

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

falls_under_community_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
falls_under_community_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

is_present_on_territory.name: is_present_on_territory
is_present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory (directly asserted as a background fact in a case).

satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

is_in_illegal_residence.name: is_in_illegal_residence
is_in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

is_subject_to_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
is_subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

is_subject_to_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_to_international_protection_p.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the request for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real (directly asserted as a background fact).

risk_of_absconding_exists.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
risk_of_absconding_exists.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, established after individual examination on the basis of one or more objective criteria.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_authority
recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_p.name: own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_p.description: The national authority of the foreigner's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.description: The foreigner falls under the category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The foreigner is identified: holds a valid travel/identity document, or is recognised by their national authority willing to issue a laissez-passer, or falls under a ministerial laissez-passer nationality category.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 for risk of absconding is present for the person.

criterion_1_present.name: criterion_1_present
criterion_1_present.description: Criterion 2(1) is present: no timely residence or protection application after illegal entry/stay.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

no_international_protection_request_in_t.name: no_international_protection_request_in_time
no_international_protection_request_in_t.description: The person did not submit a request for international protection within the legally provided period.

used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.description: The person used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_forged_documents_in_proced.name: used_false_or_forged_documents_in_procedure
used_false_or_forged_documents_in_proced.description: The person used false or forged documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_in_procedure.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
committed_fraud_in_procedure.description: The person committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure.name: used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure
used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure.description: The person used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

criterion_2_present.name: criterion_2_present
criterion_2_present.description: Criterion 2(2) is present: the person used false information, forged documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for implementing or supervising regulations on access, residence, establishment, and removal.

criterion_3_present.name: criterion_3_present
criterion_3_present.description: Criterion 2(3) is present: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the relevant authorities.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_t.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refoulement_removal
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_t.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a transfer, refoulement, or removal measure.

failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refouleme.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refoulement_removal
failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refouleme.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refoulement, or removal measure.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_e.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_e.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban.name: failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban.description: The person has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_l.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_l.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refoulement, or removal.

failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.description: The person has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refoulement, or removal.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_f.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_freedom_restricting_measure_public_order
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_f.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

failed_to_comply_with_freedom_restrictin.name: failed_to_comply_with_freedom_restricting_measure_public_order
failed_to_comply_with_freedom_restrictin.description: The person has already failed to comply with a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_e.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_e.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another Member State.

failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.description: The person has already failed to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another Member State.

criterion_4_present.name: criterion_4_present
criterion_4_present.description: Criterion 2(4) is present: the person indicated unwillingness or already failed to comply with a relevant measure.

subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_sta.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_sta.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_5_present.name: criterion_5_present
criterion_5_present.description: Criterion 2(5) is present: the person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State.

submitted_new_application_after_refusal_.name: submitted_new_application_after_refusal_of_entry_or_residence
submitted_new_application_after_refusal_.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence.

submitted_new_application_after_end_of_r.name: submitted_new_application_after_end_of_residence
submitted_new_application_after_end_of_r.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a decision ending their residence.

submitted_new_application_after_refoulem.name: submitted_new_application_after_refoulement_or_removal
submitted_new_application_after_refoulem.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refoulement or removal measure.

criterion_6_present.name: criterion_6_present
criterion_6_present.description: Criterion 2(6) is present: the person submitted a new application immediately after a relevant adverse decision or measure.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound state after submitting an international protection request.

criterion_7_present.name: criterion_7_present
criterion_7_present.description: Criterion 2(7) is present: the person concealed prior fingerprints in another Dublin-bound state.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

criterion_8_present.name: criterion_8_present
criterion_8_present.description: Criterion 2(8) is present: the person submitted multiple applications with negative outcomes.

concealed_prior_protection_request_in_ot.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_in_other_state
concealed_prior_protection_request_in_ot.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another Dublin-bound state.

criterion_9_present.name: criterion_9_present
criterion_9_present.description: Criterion 2(9) is present: the person concealed a prior protection request in another Dublin-bound state.

declared_purpose_differs_from_applicatio.name: declared_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
declared_purpose_differs_from_applicatio.description: The person declared that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection request or residence application.

file_shows_purpose_differs_from_applicat.name: file_shows_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
file_shows_purpose_differs_from_applicat.description: It appears from the person's file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection request or residence application.

criterion_10_present.name: criterion_10_present
criterion_10_present.description: Criterion 2(10) is present: the person's declared or apparent purpose differs from the purpose of their application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

criterion_11_present.name: criterion_11_present
criterion_11_present.description: Criterion 2(11) is present: the person is subject to a fine for a manifestly unlawful appeal.
